_comment: Ladon signature matrix for analyzer. RU/HOME run Ladon CLI probes for targets with domain+ladon=true. Raw-IP backup precheck stays in ip-watchdog because Ladon CLI v1 cannot force IP with ru.goida.fun SNI.

ru-backup.reason: Ladon CLI v1 cannot probe raw IP with ru.goida.fun SNI

home-observer.reason: HOME is the remote vantage point, not a switch target
